label: Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives

node.label: Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives
node.definition: Predicted value is matched to reward plus discounted future value; it operationally connects Reinforcement learning and Dynamical systems & control theory.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives is to connect Reinforcement learning, Dynamical systems & control theory to downstream capabilities including Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives.
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Reinforcement learning, Dynamical systems & control theory.

dependencies.rationale: Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives uses Reinforcement learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives uses Dynamical systems & control theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives uses Game theory & decision theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Predicted value is matched to reward plus discounted future value; it operationally connects Reinforcement learning and Dynamical systems & control theory.

The role of Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives is to connect Reinforcement learning, Dynamical systems & control theory to downstream capabilities including Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives.

A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Reinforcement learning, Dynamical systems & control theory.
Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives uses Reinforcement learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
